changelog.note: Reference prototype — evidence-based strength/fitness curriculum from r/Fitness wiki, Stronger By Science, Renaissance Periodization, Jeff Nippard, Barbell Medicine. Physical skill where AI CANNOT see your form (the central honest-limit): 4 modules carry honest_limits (medical clearance / can't-see-form / big-lift injury / injury-vs-soreness). NOT medical or PT advice. Full 8-route web run via `update 私教 fitness`.
